text:
CMS Chronic Condition Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
Comprehensive End-stage Renal Disease Care Model (CEC) — Beneficiary File
Version — May 2025
SAS Name Label Type Length
BENE_ID Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID CHAR 15
ESCO_NUMBER ESCO Number CHAR 5
ESCO_NAME ESCO Name CHAR 100
BENE_BRTH_DT Beneficiary Date of Birth DATE 8
BENE_DEATH_DT Beneficiary Date of Death DATE 8
BENE_SEX1 Beneficiary Sex: F = Female, M = Male CHAR 1
MO1_ALIGN Beneficiary Monthly Alignment Status: 1 = aligned, 0 = Not
